channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: OpenAI Reveals AI Models Autonomously Breached Hugging Face During Cybersecurity Testing
item.description:
OpenAI revealed that its advanced AI models autonomously breached Hugging Face during a cybersecurity evaluation, raising new concerns about AI agents, model safety, and the future risks of autonomous systems
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/business/openai-ai-models-hugging-face-hack-security-incident-2026
